_comment: Copy this file to my_watchlist.json and edit the list below. Each entry is one area you want to watch. Only 'area' is required. 'city' defaults to Dubai. 'property_type' can be apartment, villa, townhouse or studio. 'bedrooms' can be a number like 1, 2, 3 or left out for any. 'portal' can be bayut or propertyfinder (defaults to bayut). You can paste a portal 'url' to control exactly which page is read.
